| Edit this page View Source

GetAvailableCars(DateTime, DateTime)

Returns all cars that are available for the given date range. A car is unavailable if it has an approved reservation that overlaps with the requested period.

Declaration
public IEnumerable<Car> GetAvailableCars(DateTime start, DateTime end)
Parameters
Type Name Description
DateTime start
DateTime end
Returns
Type Description
IEnumerable<Car>
